leadText: Chilling Neigh (Japanese: しろのいななき White Neigh) is an Ability introduced during Generation VIII, in The Crown Tundra. It is the signature Ability of Glastrier.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with Chilling Neigh directly causes another Pokémon (including allies) to faint by using a damaging move, its Attack is increased by one stage. If its Attack is already at +6 stages, Chilling Neigh will not activate. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Chilling Neigh has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with Chilling Neigh directly causes another Pokémon (including allies) to faint by using a damaging move, its Attack is increased by one stage. If its Attack is already at +6 stages, Chilling Neigh will not activate.
